config.seed_text: In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.output_text: As you may recall, though, there's no sign that we've done anything wrong or our words will actually end up being written at all! That doesn't mean any new lines can start leaking out into space (though some might do), so they're probably not going anywhere yet...

TEXT:
In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us. As you may recall, though, there's no sign that we've done anything wrong or our words will actually end up being written at all!
